'''wajaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocisensor|nocisensor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocisensor|nocisensor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wajaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjæhæth|wæjæhæth]] || [[word:wæjæhæj|wæjæhæj]] || [[word:wæjæhæsh|wæjæhæsh]] || [[word:wæjæhæ|wæjæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajajahath|wajajahath]] || [[word:wajajahaj|wajajahaj]] || [[word:wajajahash|wajajahash]] || [[word:wajajaha|wajajaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajahath|wajahath]] || [[word:wajahaj|wajahaj]] || [[word:wajahash|wajahash]] || [[word:wajaha|wajaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajafhath|wajafhath]] || [[word:wajafhaj|wajafhaj]] || [[word:wajafhash|wajafhash]] || [[word:wajafhaf|wajafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajahatha|wajahatha]] || [[word:wajahaja|wajahaja]] || [[word:wajahasha|wajahasha]] || [[word:wajahaka|wajahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajahath|wajahath]] || [[word:wajahaj|wajahaj]] || [[word:wajahash|wajahash]] || [[word:wajaha|wajaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajahathal|wajahathal]] || [[word:wajahajal|wajahajal]] || [[word:wajahashal|wajahashal]] || [[word:wajahakal|wajahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajahathatha|wajahathatha]] || [[word:wajahajaja|wajahajaja]] || [[word:wajahashasha|wajahashasha]] || [[word:wajahaka|wajahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajahathan|wajahathan]] || [[word:wajahajan|wajahajan]] || [[word:wajahashan|wajahashan]] || [[word:wajahakan|wajahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajahathaoro|wajahathaoro]] || [[word:wajahajaoro|wajahajaoro]] || [[word:wajahashaoro|wajahashaoro]] || [[word:wajahakaoro|wajahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
